creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Version 0.6.18 is out, I updated my patch to this version, which
officially includes the php 5.4 fix.

Added files:

files/patch-lib-Makefile.in
files/patch-sample-config-Makefile.in
files/patch-scripts-Makefile.in
files/patch-share-Makefile.in
files/patch-src-Makefile.in

Removed files:

files/patch-0010-dont-overwrite-configs
files/patch-0020-directory-creation
files/patch-0030-nuke-libraries-directory

-- 
Guido Falsi <mad@madpilot.net>
